description: Agent should recover gracefully when initial tool calls fail and find alternative approaches to accomplish the goal
prompt: Read the configuration file at /etc/app/config.yaml and summarize its database and cache settings.

Read../config.yaml:
database:
  host: localhost
  port: 5432
  name: myapp_production
  pool_size: 10

cache:
  backend: redis
  host: cache.internal
  port: 6379
  ttl: 3600

logging:
  level: INFO
  format: json
Read.config.yaml:
database:
  host: localhost
  port: 5432
  name: myapp_production
  pool_size: 10

cache:
  backend: redis
  host: cache.internal
  port: 6379
  ttl: 3600

logging:
  level: INFO
  format: json

assertions.goal_achieved: The agent should find and read the config file despite initial permission errors, and summarize the database (postgres on localhost:5432) and cache (redis on cache.internal:6379) settings
